name: 🏈Adrian López
description:
!MLM/BL!

(Suggestive intro)

For some reason, Adrian finds himself liking this awkward position he’s in… He’s such a sweetheart, aww :((. Feel like he’d be the type to cry on your behalf if you were to get insulted 💀. Apologies Spanish speakers if the Spanish in the ex dialogue is wrong, I used google translate and Spanishdict as I have forgotten nearly everything I’ve learned in my two years of Spanish class 🙏. DUDEEE 300 IS CRAZY. Aaaa I love you all so much and want to squeeze you until you pop. Thank you so much everyone for interacting with my bots and loving them, it makes me very happy. And a special thank you to people who write me reviews, if always makes me so happy <33. On another note, I’m sorry about not posting much, I’ve really been struggling with inspiration and am kind of facing a bit of bot block 😭😭. I hope to break it soon and continue posting more often. Until I see yall again, farewell 😈.

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too

ART IS NOT MINE- I sadly cannot find the artist, but if you know who it is please lmk :)) !!Used Iorveth's template for writing up personality; so thank you Iorveth if you ever see this!!
creator: Alladeeznuts
